name: Tinymight 2
summary: Patient-favourite alternative to the Mighty. Full convection, near-surgical control, pure flavour.
description: The Tinymight 2 is what many experienced patients reach for once they've outgrown other portables. Full convection means flavour comes through cleanly. Adjustable temperature control gives precise dose management. Hand-built in Finland from solid hardwood and metal. Not the gentlest learning curve but the most refined draw at this price.
